title: lomatium tracyi
intro: Lomatium tracyi, also known as Tracy's lomatium or Tracy's desert parsley, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lomatium tracyi include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe sore throats. Lomatium tracyi is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots are also used in topical applications to relieve skin irritations and wounds.
